Match Point (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $23,089,926Details
International Box Office $64,861,002
Worldwide Box Office $87,950,928
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,266,465
Total $8,266,465
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$398,593 (1.7% of total gross)
Legs:7.87 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:26.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$15,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:8 opening theaters/512 max. theaters, 8.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $42,185,096

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 28th, 2005 (Wide) by Dreamworks SKG
January 20th, 2006 (Expands Wide) by Dreamworks SKG
International Releases: April 13th, 2006 (Wide) (South Korea)
September 29th, 2025 (Special Engagement) (Italy)
Video Release: April 25th, 2006 by Dreamworks Video
MPA Rating: R for some sexuality.
Running Time: 124 minutes
Plot point: Aspiring Actress / Actor, Dream Sequence, Dysfunctional Family, Former Professional Athlete, Infidelity, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Tennis
Social setting: Retirement
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
